sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date DateTime, event_value String);
SELECT id, toQuarter(event_date) AS quarter FROM test_dates WHERE toQuarter(event_date) = 1;
SELECT id, toQuarter(event_date) AS quarter FROM test_dates WHERE toQuarter(event_date) = (SELECT toQuarter(CURRENT_DATE()));
SELECT id, toQuarter(event_date) AS quarter FROM test_dates WHERE quarter = (SELECT max(toQuarter(event_date)) FROM test_dates WHERE event_value = 'test4');
SELECT id, toQuarter(event_date) AS quarter FROM test_dates WHERE event_value LIKE 'test%' AND toQuarter(event_date) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates) + 0;
CREATE TABLE test_numeric (num UInt32, event_date DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_numeric VALUES (1, '2023-01-01 00:00:00'), (2, 'Invalid Date String', 2);
SELECT num, toQuarter(CAST(event_date AS DateTime)) FROM test_numeric WHERE num = (SELECT COUNT() FROM test_dates);
SELECT id, toQuarter(event_date) AS quarter FROM test_dates GROUP BY toQuarter(event_date) HAVING quarter > 2;
SELECT num, toQuarter(event_date) AS quarter FROM test_numeric WHERE toQuarter(event_date) IS NULL OR toQuarter(event_date) = 1;
SELECT AVG(num) AS average FROM (SELECT num, toQuarter(CAST(event_date AS DateTime)) AS quarter FROM test_numeric);
SELECT id, toQuarter(event_date) AS quarter FROM test_dates ORDER BY (SELECT toQuarter(CURRENT_DATE()));
